landing.title: Customer experience AI built for LTV | Gladly
landing.text:
Customer experience AI built for LTV | Gladly
Skip to main content
Why Gladly
Product
Solutions
Resources
Schedule a live tour
Back
Why Gladly
Product
Solutions
Resources
Schedule a live tour
X
Search
The only AI built for LTV
CX that drives customer devotion.
Get a demo
Try it yourself
Real results
from real customers
3x
First 30-day resolution rate increase
76%
Conversations fully resolved by AI
2.2x
Revenue per conversation
65%
Increase in CSAT
AI that treats customers like people, not problems
Gladly is the only customer experience AI purpose-built to engage customers rather than deflect them. Other AI agents declare victory with cost savings alone—Gladly delivers those savings too, but in a way that makes customers feel known, understood, and valued. Because lifetime value grows the more you treat your customers like regulars.
See how it works
Why
world-class brands
choose Gladly
"With Gladly, our agents are helping customers across channels from a single view that makes their work easier."
Kate Showalter
Vice President, Customer Care
, Crate & Barrel
"We want to build a loyal relationship with a conversation that goes over years and months. It shouldn't feel like a transaction. That's why we chose Gladly."
Jim Gallagher
VP Customer Care
, Nordstrom
"The evolution of our product has allowed us to provide options to guests much more quickly than any other airline”
Danny Cox
Vice President of Guest Experiences
, Breeze Airways
"Our AI kicks in and starts answering common, repetitive questions. If something goes wrong or it's a more complex inquiry, the AI routes the customer straight to an agent. It's a seamless transition. Our customers don't even realize they're talking to AI."
Nancy Orgill
Customer Support Manager
, Kuhl
More customer stories
The only CX AI purpose-built to drive devotion
We're raising the bar for what exceptional customer experience AI looks like. Cost savings are table stakes—and Gladly delivers them. And we power intelligent, intuitive, and engaging experiences that put customers on the most direct path to the right outcomes, every time.
AI built with customers at the center
Unlike deflection bots that treat people like problems to be automated away, Gladly puts the customers at the center of every experience to deepen relationships.
AI that values the human touch
Gladly can automatically resolve most conversations, or it can work hand in hand with support reps in Gladly Team or your CX platform. Our AI is smart enough to handle end-to-end conversations or bring in a human when needed—to deliver the best outcome every time.
Put control in the hands of business users
AI that’s fluent in every channel
Gladly is built for how real people communicate. Whether it’s voice, chat, SMS, email, or social, Gladly carries a customer’s lifelong conversation history across channels into every experience.
Meet your customer where they are
AI that is simply powerful
We made Gladly for CX people, not engineers. Write Guides in plain English that teach Gladly your brand voice, desired customer experience, when to get help from an agent, and more. Bring your entire product catalog into Gladly with a click. And refine how Gladly behaves as your business needs evolve.
Immediate value. Long-term business outcomes.
Get Gladly up and running in days, not months, with templates and Guides based on over a decade of CX experience and hundreds of millions of conversations. And by delivering experiences that recognize intent and respond with specific customer knowledge, emotional intelligence, and precise actions, Gladly helps deepen relationships that increase lifetime value.
Simplify experiences
Amplify devotion
Boost expectations
Increase LTV
Simplify experiences
Engage your customers with AI that knows them and can take actions to address their issues.
Simplify experiences
Engage your customers with AI that knows them and can take actions to address their issues.
Amplify devotion
Bring customer intelligence to every conversation to help your team deepen relationships.
Boost expectations
Don’t settle for better CX. Deliver the best customer experiences that set your brand apart.
Increase LTV
Turn conversations into personalized experiences that drive devotion and lifetime value.
Running support with a lean team?
See how small businesses and growing brands use Gladly
Learn more
Gladly wins
“Disruptive Technology of the Year”
at the CCW Excellence Awards—recognized for eliminating CX tradeoffs with a no-compromise approach to AI and service.
Gladly featured in
Forbes
for revealing the unspoken truth of AI in CX
Do AI right
Discover how Gladly delivers experiences that treat people like people.
Get to know Gladly
Do AI right
Discover how Gladly delivers experiences that treat people like people.
Get to know Gladly
Refuse to
compromise.
Give your customers the experience that sets you apart.
Let us walk you through a short demo to show how Gladly instantly transforms your customer experiences.
Request a demo

pricing.title: AI customer service that builds loyalty & efficiency | Gladly
pricing.text:
AI customer service that builds loyalty & efficiency | Gladly
Skip to main content
Why Gladly
Product
Solutions
Resources
Schedule a live tour
Back
Why Gladly
Product
Solutions
Resources
Schedule a live tour
X
Search
Home
AI customer service that builds loyalty & efficiency
The AI your customers will actually come back for
Gladly connects AI and human support in one continuous conversation, so customers feel known every step of the way.
Get a demo
Try it yourself
Real results
from real customers
3x
Faster resolution rate in the first 30 days
76%
Customer questions resolved automatically
2.2x
Revenue influenced per conversation
65%
CSAT increase
Your customers shouldn't have to explain themselves twice
Most AI support tools are built around isolated conversations with no memory of who the customer is or what’s happened before.
Gladly puts the customer at the center. Conversations stay connected across every channel, giving teams the full customer picture from the start. Customers are known before they say hello, and your team can actually help instead of catching up.
See how it works
What it looks like
when it works
"With Gladly, our agents are helping customers across channels from a single view that makes their work easier."
Kate Showalter
Vice President, Customer Care
, Crate & Barrel
"We want to build a loyal relationship with a conversation that goes over years and months. It shouldn't feel like a transaction. That's why we chose Gladly."
Jim Gallagher
VP Customer Care
, Nordstrom
"The evolution of our product has allowed us to provide options to guests much more quickly than any other airline”
Danny Cox
Vice President of Guest Experiences
, Breeze Airways
"Our AI kicks in and starts answering common, repetitive questions. If something goes wrong or it's a more complex inquiry, the AI routes the customer straight to an agent. It's a seamless transition. Our customers don't even realize they're talking to AI."
Nancy Orgill
Customer Support Manager
, Kuhl
More customer stories
Built for the way retail customers actually shop
Returns, exchanges, order status, loyalty questions, and product recommendations are the kinds of conversations retail teams handle every day. Gladly was designed around that reality, across brands like Nordstrom, Crate & Barrel, Ulta Beauty, and HOKA.
How Gladly works
Gladly resolves routine customer questions automatically across every channel, while Gladly Team gives support teams the full customer context in one place. That means conversations start informed, not from scratch.
Gladly
AI that resolves routine customer questions across every channel
Gladly Team
Give teams the full customer picture from the start
Gladly for helpdesks
Connect to Zendesk and existing support platforms without disrupting current workflows
Conversation timeline
Keep every customer conversation connected across chat, voice, email, and SMS
Configure, deploy, and optimize
Launch, manage, and improve AI experiences without heavy engineering support
Customer profile
See purchase history, preferences, and past conversations before replying
Sales assistant
Help customers discover products, make purchases, and get support in one conversation
Team assist
Help teams reply faster with AI-powered summaries, translations, and real-time context
Voice AI
Resolve phone conversations with AI that understands the full customer context
Insights & reporting
Track customer trends, team performance, and conversation outcomes in real time
See how Gladly helps teams deliver more connected support
Most teams are up and running in days. No coding required and no long implementation process.
Request a demo

Home
Customer service integrations
Gladly apps and integrations
Gladly is even more powerful when it’s connected to your entire tech stack.
By unifying data from the leading ecommerce, subscriptions, and order management platforms, Gladly powers every experience with a complete view of the customer. The result: radically efficient service that feels radically personal.
Explore our ready-to-install apps below, see how it all comes together in our
interactive demo
, or discover how you can easily build custom integrations with our
App Platform

Yahoo Decides to Fire Its Brightest Tech Minds. Facebook Will Gladly Take Them.

analysis.name: Gladly
analysis.tagline: The only AI built for LTV
analysis.value_proposition: Customer experience AI that resolves routine support automatically while building long-term customer loyalty and lifetime value across every channel.
analysis.ideal_customer: Mid-to-large retail and ecommerce brands (Nordstrom, Crate & Barrel, Ulta Beauty, HOKA) with high-volume support needing omnichannel AI that preserves brand relationships

features.name: ai agent
features.description: Autonomous AI that resolves routine customer questions end-to-end across all channels without human intervention
features.evidence_quote: 76% Conversations fully resolved by AI

features.name: multi-channel support
features.description: Unified support across voice, chat, SMS, email, and social from a single platform
features.evidence_quote: Whether it's voice, chat, SMS, email, or social, Gladly carries a customer's lifelong conversation history across channels

features.name: conversation timeline
features.description: Persistent cross-channel conversation history that links every customer interaction into one continuous thread
features.evidence_quote: Keep every customer conversation connected across chat, voice, email, and SMS

features.name: customer profile
features.description: Unified customer view showing purchase history, preferences, and past conversations before agents reply
features.evidence_quote: See purchase history, preferences, and past conversations before replying

features.name: human handoff
features.description: Seamless escalation from AI to human agent when complexity or sentiment warrants it
features.evidence_quote: Our AI is smart enough to handle end-to-end conversations or bring in a human when needed

features.name: guides
features.description: Plain-English AI configuration system for teaching Gladly brand voice, CX policies, and escalation rules
features.evidence_quote: Write Guides in plain English that teach Gladly your brand voice, desired customer experience, when to get help from an agent

features.name: product catalog integration
features.description: One-click import of full product catalog into Gladly for AI-powered product recommendations and support
features.evidence_quote: Bring your entire product catalog into Gladly with a click.

features.name: sales assistant
features.description: In-conversation product discovery, purchase facilitation, and support within a single interaction
features.evidence_quote: Help customers discover products, make purchases, and get support in one conversation

features.name: team assist
features.description: AI-powered summaries, message translations, and real-time context surfaced to human agents mid-conversation
features.evidence_quote: Help teams reply faster with AI-powered summaries, translations, and real-time context

features.name: voice ai
features.description: AI that handles inbound phone conversations with full customer context awareness
features.evidence_quote: Resolve phone conversations with AI that understands the full customer context

features.name: insights & reporting
features.description: Real-time dashboards tracking customer trends, team performance, and conversation outcomes
features.evidence_quote: Track customer trends, team performance, and conversation outcomes in real time

features.name: ootb reports
features.description: Pre-built out-of-the-box reports for common CX metrics
features.evidence_quote: OOTB Reports

features.name: insight builder
features.description: Custom report builder for constructing bespoke analytics views
features.evidence_quote: Insight Builder

features.name: liveboards
features.description: Live real-time dashboards for monitoring active support operations
features.evidence_quote: Liveboards

features.name: people match routing
features.description: Intelligent routing that matches customers to the best available agent based on context and history
features.evidence_quote: Learn about People Match for routing

features.name: workflow templates
features.description: Pre-built workflow templates for common CX processes to accelerate deployment
features.evidence_quote: Workflow Templates

features.name: compliance redaction
features.description: Automated or manual redaction of sensitive data from conversation records for compliance
features.evidence_quote: Compliance Redaction Requests

features.name: proactive email campaigns
features.description: Outbound proactive email campaign creation and delivery from within the platform
features.evidence_quote: Create a Proactive Email Campaign

features.name: message translation
features.description: Automatic translation of inbound and outbound messages for multilingual support
features.evidence_quote: Translate Inbound and Outbound Messages

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Mobile application for agents to use Gladly Team on iOS/Android devices
features.evidence_quote: Use Gladly Team On Mobile Devices

features.name: rest api / sdk
features.description: REST APIs and SDKs for custom integrations and developer access
features.evidence_quote: REST APIs, SDKs, and more.

features.name: app platform
features.description: Low-code platform for building custom integrations beyond the pre-built app catalog
features.evidence_quote: Building custom integrations on Gladly is straightforward and fast with App Platform.

features.name: helpdesk connector
features.description: Integration layer to connect Gladly AI to Zendesk and existing support platforms without workflow disruption
features.evidence_quote: Connect to Zendesk and existing support platforms without disrupting current workflows

features.name: facebook messenger support
features.description: Native support channel via Facebook Messenger
features.evidence_quote: Support customers via Facebook Messenger

features.name: cobrowse / screen share
features.description: Co-browsing, screen sharing, and video chat for complex customer support via ScreenMeet integration
features.evidence_quote: Cobrowse, screen share, video chat and remote support

features.name: csat / nps surveys
features.description: Post-interaction CSAT, NPS, CES, and star-rating surveys via integrations
features.evidence_quote: Send CSAT, CES, NPS and 5-stars surveys.

features.name: workforce management
features.description: Staffing and scheduling optimization via WFM integrations (Assembled, Playvox)
features.evidence_quote: Smarter staffing and new visibility into support operations.

features.name: qa / agent coaching
features.description: Agent quality assurance and coaching tools via MaestroQA and Calabrio integrations
features.evidence_quote: Identify issues, coach agents, and measure impact.

features.name: returns management
features.description: View and resolve customer returns inline via Loop, AfterShip, ReturnLogic, and Corso integrations
features.evidence_quote: Seamlessly view and resolve customer returns with Gladly's pre-built Loop integration

features.name: order tracking
features.description: Real-time order and shipment tracking surfaced within customer conversations via shipping integrations
features.evidence_quote: AI-powered instant customer support for seamless order tracking and updates

features.name: subscription management
features.description: Customer subscription view and management within the support workflow via Recharge, Recurly, Ordergroove integrations
features.evidence_quote: Simplify subscription management

features.name: loyalty program integration
features.description: Surfaces customer loyalty status and rewards data in agent view via Smile.io and Zinrelo integrations
features.evidence_quote: Build lasting customer relationships with loyalty info right in Gladly

features.name: customer sentiment analysis
features.description: Automated ticket sentiment and trend analysis via SentiSum and Idiomatic integrations
features.evidence_quote: Analyze tickets for customer sentiment trends

features.name: event bus / custom workflows
features.description: Real-time event routing and custom workflow automation via AWS EventBridge integration
features.evidence_quote: Design rules and custom workflows for the real-time routing of your data

features.name: reverse etl / data sync
features.description: Sync warehouse data into Gladly customer profiles via Fivetran and HighTouch integrations
features.evidence_quote: Sync data from your warehouse to Gladly

features.name: form-to-conversation routing
features.description: Route web form submissions directly into Gladly as conversations via Formspree, Formstack, Jotform
features.evidence_quote: Send form submissions directly to Gladly

features.name: gladly ai dashboard
features.description: Dedicated reporting dashboard for AI activity, resolution rates, and classification topics
features.evidence_quote: https://help.gladly.com/docs/gladly-ai-dashboard

differentiators: Only CX AI purpose-built to drive customer devotion and lifetime value, not just deflection/cost savings
Lifelong cross-channel conversation history — customers are known before they say hello
Plain-English Guides configuration — no engineers required to train or adjust AI behavior
Up and running in days with templates based on 10+ years of CX experience and hundreds of millions of conversations
AI works alongside existing helpdesks (Zendesk) without disrupting current workflows
Won CCW Excellence Awards 'Disruptive Technology of the Year' for no-compromise AI and service approach

praised: Agents can help customers across channels from a single view (Kate Showalter, Crate & Barrel)
Enables building loyal multi-year relationships that don't feel transactional (Jim Gallagher, Nordstrom)
Seamless AI-to-agent transition that customers don't notice (Nancy Orgill, Kuhl)
Faster options delivery than competing platforms in airline context (Danny Cox, Breeze Airways)

tiers.name: Gladly
tiers.headline_inclusions: Standalone AI product resolving routine customer questions across all channels automatically

tiers.name: Gladly Team
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI + human agent platform with full customer profile, conversation timeline, team assist, and reporting

tiers.name: Gladly for helpdesks
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI layer connecting to Zendesk and existing support platforms without workflow disruption

pricing.notes: No public pricing displayed; all tiers require demo request or 'Try it yourself' trial. Three distinct product lines: Gladly (AI-only), Gladly Team (full platform), Gladly for helpdesks (integration layer). Pricing page shows no tier prices or seat minimums — contact-sales for all.
